examples: Exorbitant housing prices have created an acute shortage of affordable housing for the poor.
The exorbitant cost of our health-insurance benefits reflects the high dollar amount of medical expenses incurred by our employees.
But prices in London are exorbitant.
The Expo will be just like the Olympics, only much bigger and far more exorbitant.
Too many of us have charged exorbitant rates so that others could charge exorbitant rates.
